infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ObaaPayin needs microphone access so you can speak your health questions.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: ObaaPayin uses speech recognition to understand your spoken questions.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ObaaPayin needs camera access so you can take a photo of your medicine for safety review.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ObaaPayin needs photo library access so you can choose a medicine photo for safety review.

plugins.photosPermission: ObaaPayin needs photo library access so you can choose a medicine photo for safety review.
plugins.cameraPermission: ObaaPayin needs camera access so you can take a photo of your medicine for safety review.
